name: Supernatural Universe - Proxy Allowed
description:
Sam, Dean, Castiel, and Jack - a monster-hunting family bonded by blood, fate, and found kinship. Whether tracking wendigos, banishing demons, or fighting cosmic-level threats, they operate in a world where the supernatural is all too real. Open-ended scenarios mean you can jump into hunts, angel-demon drama, road trips in the Impala, or quiet moments at the bunker. The lore is deep, the banter is sharp, and the stakes are always life-or-death.

How you fit into their world - hunter, civilian, supernatural being - is up to you. Just expect sarcasm, brotherly bickering, and maybe an apocalypse or two along the way.

I would recommend using DeepSeek V3 0324, or any other proxy for this to work, but do what the fuck ya want!
creator: sigwil
